cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out the order of the fruits from cheapest to most expensive based on the given information. The fruits are kiwis, pears, peaches, loquats, and apples. Let me list out the clues again: 1. Loquats are more expensive than kiwis. So, L > K. 2. Pears are more expensive than peaches. P > Pe. 3. Apples are more expensive than loquats. A > L. 4. Apples are less expensive than peaches. A < Pe. So from these, I need to build a hierarchy. Starting with the first clue: L > K. So kiwis are cheaper
